metric_notes.doc_scoring: Document metrics are scored only when gold_sources is present.
metric_notes.page_scoring: Page metrics are scored only when gold_sources is present and at least one of page_range or anchor_text is present.
metric_notes.page_ndcg: Page nDCG uses graded relevance where rel=2 is an exact page hit or anchor-text fallback hit, and rel=1 is the correct document with the wrong or unknown page.
